title: Project: Taste Without Tasting Menu
objectives: Research traditional dishes from a chosen country
Create a visual food menu with descriptions and taste categories
Present the menu to the class

key_concepts.explanation: Students choose a country and create a menu showing two traditional dishes. For each dish: draw or paste a picture, name the dish, identify the taste (sweet or salty). Write facts about the country. Present to class.

examples.problem: Create a Taste Without Tasting Menu
solution_steps: Complete its menu with Dish One and Dish Two
Draw or paste pictures of each dish
Make your work neat and colourful
examples.answer: A completed food menu with two dishes, pictures, taste labels, and country facts
examples.visual_description: Menu template with two dish areas, taste checkboxes (sweet/salty), and a facts section

teaching_notes: This project combines cultural awareness with descriptive writing about food. Students can research authentic dishes from Gulf countries, Asian countries, or beyond. Good for class 'food fair' presentations. Encourage using imperatives for recipe-style descriptions.
